title: tui/event.rs: payment state machine transition guard is correct and necessary
description: is_valid_transition() guards all payment state mutations in decrypt_and_display. Each mutation site checks the guard before modifying session state, and there are unit tests for all transitions from the documented spec (not from the implementation). A future contributor might suggest removing the guard 'since peers should only send valid transitions.' The guard must stay: any connected peer can craft arbitrary ClearMessage::Payment payloads (the relay is message-opaque), and without the guard an attacker can move a session to Confirmed without going through Address/Sent.
